name: Phase Program Healer Child
outcome_goal: The Phase 50 result is healed in its own child workflow without advancing the phase boundary.
anti_requirements: Do NOT advance the registry past Phase 50
Do NOT widen the Phase 50 file scope
Do NOT skip the focused authority verification commands after edits

jobs.label: phase_50_healer
jobs.description: Tighten the Phase 50 result after review without advancing the phase boundary
jobs.outcome_goal: The Phase 50 worker result is patched for any concrete local issues and remains ready for human approval
jobs.prompt:
Work from `/workspace` only. Apply a narrow healing pass to the current Phase 50 result.

Read and write only these sandbox paths:
- `/workspace/planning/phase-program/phase_050_current_packet.md`
- `/workspace/planning/phase-program/praxis_0_100_registry.json`
- `/workspace/Code&DBs/Workflow/system_authority/workflow_migration_authority.json`
- `/workspace/Code&DBs/Workflow/system_authority/generate_workflow_migration_authority.py`
- `/workspace/Code&DBs/Workflow/storage/_generated_workflow_migration_authority.py`
- `/workspace/Code&DBs/Workflow/storage/migrations.py`
- `/workspace/Code&DBs/Workflow/storage/postgres/schema.py`
- `/workspace/Code&DBs/Workflow/tests/integration/test_workflow_schema_authority_artifacts.py`
- `/workspace/Code&DBs/Workflow/tests/integration/test_workflow_migration_policy_boundaries.py`
- `/workspace/Code&DBs/Workflow/tests/integration/test_workflow_migration_contracts.py`

Scope rules:
- Stay inside the Phase 50 file scope
- Address concrete local issues visible in the current state, especially around policy-aware lookup, generated authority drift, workflow packet quality, and machine-readable phase governance
- If the review found no issues, only make a minimal tightening pass and preserve the current boundary
- Do not advance the registry past Phase 50

After edits, rerun the focused authority verification commands.
